programme.title: Kabut Sutra Ungu
programme.desc: Miranti ditinggal mati suaminya yang mengalami kecelakaan sebagai pilot. Hidup menjanda ini yang membawa banyak masalah, mulai dari keusilan kawan lama, pemuda tanggung, maupun kenalan baru. Miranti tetap berusaha hidup mandiri

programme.title: Kuntilanak 2
programme.desc: Setelah peristiwa dalam film sebelumnya, Sam (Julie Estelle) sudah putus dengan Agung dan saat ini berada dalam dilema dalam memperjuangkan jati dirinya dari sisi gelapnya yang semakin kuat kendati adanya wangsit Kuntilanak.

programme.title: Bangkit Dari Lumpur
programme.desc: Shakira harus berhadapan dengan maut setelah tanpa sengaja menyaksikan pembunuhan yang dilakukan oleh sekelompok orang. Mayat Shakira dibuang di lumpur Sidoarjo dan jantungnya diambil untuk dijual.

programme.title: Bing Slamet Sibuk
programme.desc: Bercerita tentang Bing Slamet yang berhasil menaklukkan anak-anak keluarga Eddy Sud, orang yang mempekerjakannya, dengan kepandaiannya bernyanyi. Film ini juga sarat dengan lelucon dengan hadirnya grup Kwartet jaya.

programme.title: And Arok-And Dedes
programme.desc: Ken Arok, yang dibesarkan oleh seorang perampok, berhasil diterima menjadi prajurit di Tumapel. Disana ia berjumpa dengan Ken Dedes, istri Tunggul Ametung. Niat untuk menyingkirkan Tunggul Ametung pun muncul dibenaknya

programme.title: Video Death
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang Doni yang memiliki keinginan untuk membuat video mesum dengan kekasihnya Maya di sebuah villa. Maya merupakan gadis lugu yang dikerjai oleh Doni. Di villa itu maya tidak sendiri namun mengajak temanya

programme.title: Umm Aminah
programme.desc: Ummi Aminah, ustadzah 68 tahun, memiliki jamaah setia mencapai ribuan. Ummi memiliki tujuh anak dengan berbagai macam perbedaan sifatnya

programme.title: Suami-Suami Takut Istri
programme.desc: Demi mengabulkan permintaan para istri yang meminta berbulan madu ke Bali, para suami pun mengajak para istri ke Bali. Walaupun sebenarnya ada maksud lain dibalik kebaikan para suami. Mereka berencana untuk menghadiri pertunjukan

programme.title: Pokun Roxy
programme.desc: Kisah tentang arwah gentayangan, pocong dan kuntilanak yang kerap meneror warga kampung. Fenomena ini disiasati Acong. Acong pun meminta Jupe dan Bedul berpura-pura menjadi pocong dan kuntilanak. Adegan ini direkam Acong

programme.desc: Anak perempuan Wakil Presiden diculik. Kirun dan Adul disinyalir jadi penjahatnya.

programme.title: Bradley & Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The Australian adventure continues as the boys head to the outback, where they meet a group of local farmers and help them muster their cattle. The pair then make a pit stop at a local bar, where they end up taking part in a pub quiz. The next day it's competition time as father and son go head-to-head in a race on lawnmowers! Their trip takes them back towards the coast and the beautiful Whitsundays, where a trip on a super yacht awaits them - but unfortunately they won't be doing any relaxing, because they'll be working on board!

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Gabby attempts to seduce Ross, but he rejects her advances. Kerry agrees to babysit Archie while Jai heads to Canada.

programme.title: Coronation Street

programme.title: ITV News at Ten

programme.title: The 1% Club - Soccer Aid Special
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? Do you think you might be in the top 50 per cent of the country, the top ten per cent, or even the top one per cent? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack hosts a Soccer Aid special of the quiz show - 100 sports stars and celebrities start the episode, but who will make it to the end and answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right... and win up to 100,000 pounds for charity?

programme.title: When English Football Ruled Europe
programme.desc: Two-part documentary series examining the years between 1977 and 1984 when three English football clubs - Liverpool, Nottingham Forest and Aston Villa - lifted the European Cup a record seven times. Featuring interviews with the stars of the victorious teams, the series reveals the remarkable stories behind the triumphs and explains how some of the most colourful characters in the game mastered Europe's foremost club competition. This part covers the break-up of Brian Clough's hugely successful Nottingham Forest, the re-emergence of Liverpool - who lifted their third and fourth European Cups in 1981 and 1984 - and the incredible story of Aston Villa, who upset all the odds to claim their one and only win in the competition in 1982.

programme.title: Soccer Aid: More Than Just A Game
programme.desc: Mark the 20th anniversary of star-studded football fixture Soccer Aid with this behind-the-scenes look at the passion, the rivalry and the millions raised for charity.

programme.title: Shop on TV
programme.desc: Teleshopping. [HD]

programme.title: Bullseye for Soccer Aid
programme.desc: A Soccer Aid special of the classic darts game show, with host Freddie Flintoff and celebrities Claire Marsh, Kym Marsh, Angela Barnes, Jon Richardson, Mark Wright and Olly Murs. [SL,S,AD,HD] S1 Ep6

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S,HD]

programme.title: Jason Atherton's Dubai Dishes
programme.desc: This series follows chef Jason Atherton in Dubai as he showcases some fantastic local ingredients, celebrated foodie hotspots, and brilliant local chefs as he cooks up some delicious recipes that are inspired by the region.

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: On the sweeping sands of Benone Strand, Dermot rolls up his trousers and wades into the sea to harvest water for salt-making. Guided by Clare from Mussenden Salt, he learns the traditional process of creating sea salt over an open fire right on the beach. Embracing ancient Irish traditions, they host a clan-style cookout, roasting meat, cheese, and vegetables over open flames as previous generations once did. Travelling on to Coleraine, Dermot joins local lobster fisherman Peter, heading out onto the water to haul in pots. With fresh lobster secured, Dermot visits LIR Seafood Restaurant, where husband-and-wife team Rebekah and Stevie champion a zero-waste approach to cooking. In the kitchen, Dermot gets hands-on, learning to prepare indulgent lobster rolls while discovering how thoughtful cooking can turn every part of the catch into something delicious.

programme.title: The Goonies
programme.desc: Cult adventure comedy. The community of the peaceful coastal town of Goon Docks, Oregon faces imminent foreclosure to make way for a golf course when a band of local childhood friends calling themselves the Goonies stumble upon an old map - the map provides secret clues leading to the fabled treasure of a notorious pirate known as One-Eyed Willy and sets in motion a wild mission to save their homes. With the criminal Fratelli family hot on their trail, a frantic race against time begins...

programme.title: Ainsley's Fantastic Flavours
programme.desc: Ainsley rustles up recipes made to share - tempting dishes that'll impress any guest and an absolute feast perfect for friends and family. Featuring a Vietnamese-inspired starter and a sumptuous roasted porchetta, comedians Eddie Kadi and Babatunde Aléshé show off their skills in the kitchen and Ainsley enjoys a picnic in the sun, Malta-style!

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world. [S,HD]

programme.title: James Martin's Saturday Morning
programme.desc: James is back in the kitchen on a Saturday morning where he's cooking for West End star Elaine Paige, serving up a dish in aid of Soccer Aid 2026, and enjoying recipes from chefs Jose Pizarro and Tony Singh.

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Arriving in Derry at the end of the Causeway Coastal Route, Dermot finds a city rewriting its story, with the River Foyle as its beating heart. At the Walled City Brewery - once Army Barracks during the Troubles - he uncovers a secret local ingredient behind their standout brews. For a fresh perspective, Dermot hits the water with kayak instructor Michelle, paddling the Foyle and taking in the skyline from a whole new angle - equal parts scenic and splashy. Back on land, things get fiery on a double-decker bus-turned-taco joint. At Pyke 'N' Pommes, local legend Kevin Pyke blends bold Mexican flavours with top-notch Irish seafood. Dermot gets hands-on, prepping calamari and building tasty tacos that capture Derry's evolving food scene.

programme.title: James Martin's American Adventure
programme.desc: Dallas: James's American adventure reaches Dallas as he makes trips to Southfork - the ranch made famous in the world-renowned TV series Dallas - and the Texas State Fair. [S,AD,HD] S1 Ep5

programme.title: Deal or No Deal Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a special Soccer Aid for UNICEF edition of the iconic game show as Lioness Jill Scott goes up against the infamous Banker. Supported on the wings by her Soccer Aid family, fellow Lionesses and a few famous faces, can Jill choose the right boxes and resist the Banker's tempting cash offers? And will she be brave enough to play to the end, in the hope of scoring £100,000 for her charity? There'll be just one question to answer: Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: New: Britain's Got Talent: Live Final
programme.desc: Ant and Dec host a dazzling night of performances as Britain's Got Talent reaches the spectacular live final where one act will be crowned this year's winner. [S,HD] S19 Ep14

programme.title: Nobody's Fool
programme.desc: Emily Atack and Danny Dyer host a strategic reality quiz packed full of drama and deception. With fewer players left, and the finale looming, alliances tighten and betrayals feel inevitable. Harry reveals himself to be great at maths and this has not gone unnoticed. The game has now turned. Whispered conversations, overheard plots and shifting loyalties dominate the house as players begin thinking not about survival, but about who they want to face in the final. A maths challenge rewards bold, decisive play from Billy and delivers a powerful advantage, are Harry’s days numbered? With trust diminishing by the hour, does Kamaal succumb to group pressure or does he turn on one of the co-conspirators? Regardless, playing nicely is no longer an option.

programme.desc: Fantasy family comedy. Recently-widowed Cedric Brown struggles to control his brood of seven children, who have managed to drive away 17 different nannies with their bad behaviour - when Cedric arranges for the mysterious Nanny McPhee to come and look after the children, led by the precocious Simon, the children attempt to scare her in the same way as they have the others, but it soon becomes clear that their bad behaviour brings about supernatural and eerie reprisals... Meanwhile, Cedric's uptight Aunt Adelaide has insisted that unless he finds a new wife within a month, she will take one of the children into custody. programme.desc: Emily Atack and Danny Dyer host a strategic reality quiz packed full of drama and deception. The pressure intensifies as the final looms. A quiz produces unexpected results, leaving one player desperate to be believed for once, while Billy continues with a high-risk bluff designed to frame Harry and control the narrative. Valuation descends into chaos. Accusations fly, emotions boil over and the vote collapses into deadlock. When a rule is broken, the hosts are forced to intervene, triggering a dramatic reversal and a shock exit that reshapes the game. As night falls, the house faces an impossible choice — risk everything, or walk away.

programme.title: The Assembly
programme.desc: The Assembly returns with never-before-seen questions and moments from across its second series. Stephen Fry reveals more about his wild past, Nicola Sturgeon bonds over Cilla Black and long johns, Rylan opens up about grief, and Anna Maxwell Martin takes on a chaotic game of question tennis. Across the episode, there are outrageous questions, poignant reflections, moments of pure joy and toilet breaks. Lenny Henry looks back on racial divides, comedy and his early career, Aitch talks family, fame and friendship, and Nicola Sturgeon reflects movingly on being child-free and the life she built outside politics. From cocaine smuggling and Supermarket Sweep secrets to EastEnders impressions, this is The Assembly - unseen and unmissable.

programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. A spate of burglaries results in a young woman being hospitalised, Greengrass and Bernie try their hand at modern art, and Nick and Jo come to a big decision about their future.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. The return of a notorious felon has Blaketon longing for his old job, Greengrass persuades some visiting psychic researchers that his house is haunted, and Nick, Jo and Katie say a poignant farewell to Aidensfield.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Neil Dudgeon's first appearance as the head of Causton CID. John Barnaby initially rebuffs a request from Harriet Wingate, headmistress at the upmarket Darnley Park Girls School, to patrol their forthcoming classic car show, but Barnaby is intrigued when he learns that the remains of famous racing driver Duncan Palmer have been discovered at Darnley Park 40 years after he was thought to have drowned in the Lake District. Harriet is opposed to the plans of school governor Jamie Cameron and so invites his ex-wife Kate together with her father, racing legend Peter Fossett, to the show - Fossett is annoyed that his fellow judge is club DJ Dave 'Doggy' Day, who knows nothing about cars. Soon afterwards, Doggy is crushed to death under Kate's car and Barnaby thinks the video diaries of two pupils could hold clues to the killing, but a new lead takes him to meet someone at the barn where Duncan Palmer met his death. When the killer turns on him, could Barnaby's first case also be his last?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Donna gets a nasty surprise when Shane reveals that he knows about her night of passion with Ross. Andy is angry to discover Jo has been drinking alcohol during her `pregnancy'.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tony's dark side takes over as he faces another obstacle in his path to business glory. Tyrone springs a surprise on a dejected Molly, and Julie tries to get a job at the factory.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: John breaks up a fight involving Chesney, but his good deed backfires. Tony sweet-talks Rosie into persuading Kevin to sell up and David plots to make Tina jealous.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a Yorkshire village in the 1960s. An old Army friend of Blaketon causes havoc in the village, and Greengrass is in trouble when he innocently buys some stolen sheep.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a Yorkshire village in the 1960s. Loyalties are tested when Blaketon finds himself at the wrong end of the law, and Greengrass tries to turn some dismantled motorcycles into hard cash.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Family life is invading Martin's once-tranquil existence and clutter and noise is everywhere - Louisa wants Martin to engage more with James and so arranges for Martin to take James to a playgroup and sing songs with the other mums while the annoying Millie shoves a dirty sock puppet in James' face. When the parents have to pair up, James and Martin are teamed up with mum Trace and daughter Shona - Trace confides in Martin that she is worried about Shona as she is slow at grabbing objects, but Martin then infuriates Trace by saying that Shona is probably just backward. Elsewhere, Al helps Ruth move into a cottage in the village where she meets a grumpy new neighbour who doesn't want her pestering him, a woman visits the Doc with a 'mole', and Bert helps Jennifer move into his place - everything is going well until he catches her with a needle in the bathroom, and at which point Bert thinks Jennifer could be a drug addict and investigates.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Louisa is having problems sleeping and is worried about Mrs Tishell coming back to the village - she presumes that this is why Martin is up too, but Martin tells Louisa that she shouldn't be worried about Mrs Tishell's return. However, this doesn't put Louisa's mind at rest and she goes to see Ruth - who eventually agrees to pop in on Mrs Tishell - the next day. Meanwhile, Penhale embarks on a survival course in the middle of the local moors in his bid to be selected for an elite police squad and has to find his way back to Portwenn with just his initiative and Buddy the dog, the Doc attends to a beachcomber who has trodden on a shard of glass, Al and Morwenna have an internet dating disaster at a local pub, and romance blossoms for Bert and Jennifer.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A lack of experienced officers means that Chief Superintendent Innocent has asked Lewis to come out of retirement to help newly-promoted DI Hathaway with his first murder investigation, a tricky case that bridges the worlds of neurosurgery, blood sports and animal rights - after an arson attack on a hunting lodge, Hathaway and new partner DS Lizzie Maddox have a dead neurosurgeon on their hands. Alastair Stoke was shot in the head on the farmland he co-owned with his troubled business partner, but the case begins to career out of control as Hathaway delves into the network of fear and loathing that surrounds the surgeon.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Gritty crime drama series following Manchester DCs Janet Scott and Rachel Bailey. Rachel's moment of indiscretion threatens to come back and haunt her when Sean takes a phone call from her recent one night stand. Janet forces Ade to move in with his new girlfriend and asks her mum Dorothy to take his place. The team investigates the brutal murder of a wealthy man whose double life left him vulnerable to exploitation. Could his son really be the prime suspect?

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: DCs Janet Scott and Rachel Bailey tackle more extreme and disturbing crimes whilst juggling their own complicated personal lives. Rachel resorts to sleeping under her desk in response to Sean's possessiveness, but finds a much more comfortable place to rest her head when Janet invites her to stay at her place. Janet prepares to take the next step in her career as sergeant, but a much younger candidate is given the role. Back on the case from earlier in the series - when an elderly wife was found decapitated with her bedridden husband languishing nearby, there are further twists to the tale as the couple's daughter directs Janet to her brother's remains, admitting that she helped to bury him. Is she a witness or a suspect?

programme.title: Inspector Morse

programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. When Miss Marple is overjoyed to be attending the wedding of her old housemaid, she finds a house full of secrets and a family desperately trying to come to terms with the fact that their brother was sent to the gallows for a murder that he did not commit.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. DCI Barnaby and his temporary DS Jamie Winter must unravel a sinister web of lies from both past and present in order to catch a killer in the ghost village of Little Auburn, a place that has been left derelict and untouched since the Second World War. As three groups fight over the village's future, its fate rests with local landowner Roderick Craven - when one of those involved in the dispute is run over by a tank while cycling home and more deaths subsequently occur, can Barnaby find the link between them and stop the killings?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. DCI Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter discover just how far some people will go for power when they investigate the death of a member of the Bleakridge Watch - a local neighbourhood watch group - in the most remote village in Midsomer. The victim is local butcher Angus Colton, who was found lying frozen in his meat freezer - the police are told that that pub landlord Mitch McAllister hated Angus, but Mitch and his partner Lena claim that the Watch are a total nuisance. Later in a dark field, an old barn is set alight...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Tensions run high in Lower Pampling as a new type of cricket threatens a century of tradition - star batsman Leo Henderson wins a match for his team and takes them through to the C10 Slam tournament semi-final, but he is then found dead in the practice area pummelled by cricket balls later that day. DCI Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter investigate the death of the star cricketer during a tournament which draws them into a dangerous game - Barnaby learns that C10 is not everyone's cup of tea and council members who hate its vulgarity plan a village vote to decide whether it stays, but could the dislike of a cricket format really be a motive for murder?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Under cover of darkness, local estate agent Seb Huntington releases animals from their cages at the Belville Small Pet Show - someone confronts Seb and the following morning Ailsa Benson arrives to set up her pet food stall to find Seb dead surrounded by escaped bunnies... Barnaby and Winter meet locum pathologist Dr Oliver Marcet and learn that the victim died from a stab wound to the neck - hearing Ailsa Benson's alibi, Barnaby and Winter next interview Seb's distraught girlfriend Tegan Langton and her boss Delphi Hartley. Finding no reason anyone would want to harm Seb or sabotage the show, they leave Tegan to be comforted by best friend Shray Varma watched from afar by the mysterious Errol Judd. When Winter gleans from Seb's computer that he was sabotaging the show, Barnaby posits that someone murdered Seb to stop him - was this a case of a rivalry taken too far, or is the killer driven by something darker?

programme.title: Vera

programme.title: Inspector Morse

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of sleuthing gardeners. Rosemary's maternal side is brought out when she and Laura find an abandoned baby under a gooseberry bush in Penelope Braxton's garden - Penelope is remarrying her ex-husband Tim and our heroines are working on a memorial garden as an intended wedding present from Penelope to Tim. Rosemary and Laura are forced to care for the baby as they try to find out who the mother is and why she would abandon him, but events take a dramatic turn when neighbouring artist Sir Carlos Potter is found murdered - how is he connected, will the girls be able to reunite mother and baby, and will Rosemary remain enchanted by the prospect of bringing up a child?

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of sleuthing gardeners. Laura's son Matthew and his friends are on an annual tennis holiday at a beautiful tennis camp in southern Spain that is owned by former champion Ray Parfitt - meanwhile, Laura and Rosemary are creating a trophy garden for a pro-am tennis tournament that Ray is holding. When one of the players is found dead after a night out, everyone assumes that it was a drunken accident but the girls suspect foul play - as Rosemary rediscovers the thrill of riding motor scooters in the neighbouring village of Mija while Laura finds the local bullring to be a mysterious and threatening place, the value of property proves to be the driving force for evil in this idyllic sun-drenched resort.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series. Rosemary's cousin Charles is performing with an amateur dramatic group and Rosemary and Laura have been brought along to prepare the garden of the Open Air Theatre in time for opening night - everyone is deeply shocked when one of the actors accidentally shoots himself during rehearsal, but the police then discover the gun was loaded with live ammunition and not blanks. It becomes apparent that there is a murderer in their midst - was the bullet intended for Adam, or the theatre's philanthropist Victor Channing? As Victor's wife Jenny gets stage fright, her role in the play is given to Laura to Rosemary's displeasure - with opening night fast approaching, Rosemary struggles to complete the garden on her own as Laura, who is delighted with her part, becomes more involved with the production. Will the play go without a hitch, or is someone out to sabotage it?

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Miss Marple investigates when her holiday at an old school friend's coastal villa is interrupted by the mysterious death of one of her fellow guests just hours after he told the ghostly tale of a murderous child.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Careful not to be seen, Samantha Berry slips away from Whitcombe Grange - while dressed in Georgian period attire - on her way to a secret rendezvous. Unaware that a drone is filming her, she is then stabbed to death by an unseen assailant... With Kam away on a course, Barnaby and Winter meet locum pathologist Petra Antonescu and she informs them that the victim was stabbed with a feather quill pen - however, Barnaby is puzzled to find a syringe lying nearby. Tracing Samantha to the Grange, Barnaby and Winter meet owners James and Kitty Oswood - who explain that they host Jane Austen experience weekends - and Winter learns from the Oswoods' rebellious daughter Polly that Samantha kept asking questions about the house and village. When Samantha is found to be a journalist with a special interest in the local village's new delivery service for prescriptions by drone, Barnaby and Winter need to look back in time if they are to find her killer.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. The annual Thassingham Classical Music Festival draws in big audiences as several musicians anxiously compete for the coveted Falconer Bursary Award - shockwaves rocket though it when Jacob Wheeler is awarded the prize instead of the supremely talented Zac Sowande, but shock soon turns to horror when Jacob is found murdered strangled by violin string. Barnaby's initial investigations begin by focusing on Jacob's fellow musicians and their charismatic maestro Michael Falconer, who is using the festival to debut his Ninth Symphony while simultaneously belittling his own musician son Dan - when Barnaby realises that Jacob's Stradivarius is missing and that Jacob might not have been the completely dedicated musician his sister Natalie claims him to be, his subsequent investigations lead them deep into a world that is haunted by a potentially deadly curse.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Causton is buzzing at the opening of a new brewery on the site of a famously cursed Abbey. However, excitement turns to fear when a man is found boiled to death in one of the vats. DCI Barnaby and DS Winter are puzzled; could this really be about beer?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Mahesh Sidana - a butterfly collector and founding member of an elite IQ society - is found murdered after being pinned to a wall in a manner similar to his treasured butterfly specimens, DCI Barnaby and DS Winter are thrust into a crime that impacts not only on their community, but internationally. Can they catch the culprit - with the help of an old friend - before another victim is found?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the novels by Ann Cleeves. After two young people are killed in the same way - drowned and surrounded by flowers - DCI Vera Stanhope knows that she must catch the murderer before they strike again. Aided by her team, especially her trusted right-hand man Sergeant Joe Ashworth, she unpicks the complex and dysfunctional relationships amongst a group of bird-watching friends. As the friends' loyalty turns to betrayal, Vera finds that a small act of teenage blackmail and an illicit affair may have driven someone to kill.

programme.title: Smokey and the Bandit 2
programme.desc: Comedy crime caper sequel. It's been a few years since Cletus and the Bandit made their famous 28-hour run to Texas for a few cases of Coors, and the Bandit is now a washed-up has-been living in the past... that is, until Big Enos and Little Enos make him another offer. The pair want the Bandit to transport a live elephant across the United States to Texas in three days or less, but it's a mammoth task that proves far from easy when old enemy Sheriff Buford T Justice enters hot pursuit of them!

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Smokey and the Bandit 2
programme.desc: Comedy crime caper sequel. It's been a few years since Cletus and the Bandit made their famous 28-hour run to Texas for a few cases of Coors, and the Bandit is now a washed-up has-been living in the past... that is, until Big Enos and Little Enos make him another offer. The pair want the Bandit to transport a live elephant across the United States to Texas in three days or less, but it's a mammoth task that proves far from easy when old enemy Sheriff Buford T Justice enters hot pursuit of them!

programme.title: The World Is Not Enough
programme.desc: The 19th entry in the James Bond film series. Oil tycoon Sir Robert King is trying to build a pipeline along the southern end of the Caspian Sea, rivalling the large Russian lines to the north - he is murdered by Renard, a Russian terrorist who has a bullet lodged in his brain stem that makes him immune to pain. MI6 fears that King's daughter Elektra will become Renard's next target, and so Bond is assigned to protect her, but he quickly becomes suspicious about Elektra, especially when M goes missing... Meanwhile, Bond gains aid from research scientist Christmas Jones and Russian gangster Zukovsky in tracking down Renard, who is planning a nuclear disaster that threatens all of humanity.

programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.desc: From 2023. Housing expert Karianne Amlie, and her team of experts, are authorized to buy and renovate an apartment for Mathilde and Audun, who are ready to get married. The renovation quickly presents major problems.

programme.title: Buying a home blindly
programme.desc: From 2023. Hønefoss is the town where housing expert Karianne Amlie has been authorized to buy and refurbish a large house with extensive renovations. The waiting time will be extremely long for participants Trond and Debbie.

programme.title: Kjartan cleans up - at home
programme.desc: From 2024. Bernt dreams of being a good host and inviting to dinner, but onion phobia and poor self-confidence in the kitchen stop him. Can Kjartan give him the courage to deliver as host, and perhaps cure the onion phobia?

programme.title: Adventurous renovation
programme.desc: From 2022. Just outside Stavanger is Randøy, and here there is a cabin with a slightly unusual shape. The owners struggle with a large staircase that takes up a lot of space, but the guys have a solution for that.

programme.title: The heroes of excitement

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: The Hateful Eight
programme.desc: Quentin Tarantino's 8th film takes place in wintry Wyoming, where eight strangers, including two bounty hunters and a wanted fugitive, find themselves battling the elements and each other.

programme.title: The Woman King
programme.desc: Inspired by true events, Viola Davis stars in an action-packed story of an elite all-female unit of warriors determined to defend their nation.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo is released from prison by the government for a top-secret covert mission to the last place on Earth he'd want to return - the jungles of Vietnam.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Matt Damon returns as Jason Bourne in Jason Bourne, with director Paul Greengrass back for another thrilling chapter. Bourne is drawn out of hiding, facing new dangers with Alicia Vikander, Vincent Cassel, and more.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Jason Bourne kembali muncul setelah lama bersembunyi ketika Nicky Parsons membocorkan data rahasia CIA. Diburu tanpa ampun, Bourne harus menghadapi masa lalunya dan menghancurkan operasi gelap penuh pembunuhan dan pengkhianatan

programme.title: Rambo 3
programme.desc: Combat has taken its toll on Rambo, but he's finally begun to find inner peace in a monastery. When Rambo's friend and mentor Col. Trautman asks for his help on a top secret mission to Afghanistan, Rambo declines but must reconsider when Trautman is captured.

programme.title: Rambo 3
programme.desc: Rambo yang penyendiri meninggalkan biara Buddha untuk membebaskan mentornya dari Pasukan Khusus (Green Beret) yang berada di bawah kendali Soviet di Afghanistan.

programme.title: Gods Of Egypt
programme.desc: Gerard Butler and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau star as rival gods locked in an epic battle to decide the fate of the universe in this thrilling fantasy-adventure.

programme.title: Gods Of Egypt
programme.desc: Gerard Butler dan Nikolaj Coster-Waldau berperan sebagai dua dewa yang berseteru, Set dan Horus. Guna mengalahkan Set yang kejam, Horus bekerjasama dengan seorang pemuda pemberani untuk menyelamatkan umat manusia.

programme.title: Godzilla Minus One
programme.desc: In postwar Japan, Godzilla brings new devastation to an already scorched landscape. With no military intervention or government help in sight, the survivors must join together in the face of despair and fight back against an unrelenting horror.

programme.title: Godzilla Minus One (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang pilot kamikaze yang dihantui rasa bersalah karena selamat mencari penebusan ketika monster raksasa yang gagal ia bunuh berubah bentuk akibat radiasi dari uji coba bom atom dan mengepung Jepang pasca-perang.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang tukang reparasi drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah dirusak oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: Jason Bourne

programme.title: Jason Bourne

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Two soldiers killed in Vietnam are revived years later as cyborg super-soldiers. But when memories return, they break free—setting up a brutal showdown between former comrades.

programme.title: Universal Soldier (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Para prajurit yang terbunuh saat bertugas dihidupkan kembali melalui eksperimen militer rahasia yang menciptakan prajurit super.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: In 1941, after bombing Tokyo, a US pilot makes an emergency landing in China. A local widow rescues him and risks everything to hide him from Japanese forces.

programme.title: Blood On The Crown
programme.desc: Tepat setelah Perang Dunia I pada tahun 1919, warga Malta bangkit untuk mencari kemerdekaan dari pemerintahan Inggris, tetapi tentara menumpas kerusuhan tersebut, pemerintah menutupi pertumpahan darah, dan lebih dari 100 warga Malta dipenjara.

programme.desc: Rambo, seorang veteran Pasukan Khusus Green Beret, berhadapan dengan seorang sheriff di wilayah Pasifik Barat Laut dan Garda Nasional.

programme.title: The Woman King
programme.desc: Inspired by true events, Viola Davis stars in an action-packed story of an elite all-female unit of warriors determined to defend their nation.

programme.title: The Woman King
programme.desc: Sejarah epik yang terinspirasi dari peristiwa nyata yang terjadi di Kerajaan Dahomey, salah satu negara bagian terkuat di Afrika pada abad ke-18 dan ke-19.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Matt Damon returns as Jason Bourne in Jason Bourne, with director Paul Greengrass back for another thrilling chapter. Bourne is drawn out of hiding, facing new dangers with Alicia Vikander, Vincent Cassel, and more.

programme.title: Transcendence
programme.desc: A brilliant but controversial research scientist becomes obsessed with his quest to create a humanistic machine, leading to a dangerous conclusion.

programme.title: Transcendence
programme.desc: Dorongan seorang ilmuwan terhadap kecerdasan buatan memiliki implikasi berbahaya ketika kesadarannya sendiri diunggah ke dalam salah satu program tersebut.

programme.title: Godzilla Minus One
programme.desc: In postwar Japan, Godzilla brings new devastation to an already scorched landscape. With no military intervention or government help in sight, the survivors must join together in the face of despair and fight back against an unrelenting horror.

programme.title: Godzilla Minus One
programme.desc: Seorang pilot kamikaze yang dihantui rasa bersalah karena selamat berusaha menebus dosanya ketika monster raksasa yang gagal dibunuhnya berubah bentuk akibat radiasi dari uji coba bom atom dan mengepung Jepang pascaperang.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Battleship (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Armada kapal terpaksa bertempur melawan armada yang asal-usulnya tidak diketahui untuk mengungkap dan menggagalkan tujuan destruktif mereka.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family's estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: Get Out (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda Afrika-Amerika mengunjungi orangtua pacarnya yang berkulit putih untuk akhir pekan, di mana kegelisahannya yang membara tentang penerimaan mereka terhadapnya akhirnya mencapai titik didih.

programme.title: Gods Of Egypt
programme.desc: Gerard Butler and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau star as rival gods locked in an epic battle to decide the fate of the universe in this thrilling fantasy-adventure.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Para prajurit yang terbunuh saat bertugas dihidupkan kembali melalui eksperimen militer rahasia yang menciptakan prajurit super.

programme.desc: In 1941, after bombing Tokyo, a US pilot makes an emergency landing in China. A local widow rescues him and risks everything to hide him from Japanese forces.

programme.title: Blood On The Crown
programme.desc: Tepat setelah Perang Dunia I pada tahun 1919, warga Malta bangkit untuk mencari kemerdekaan dari pemerintahan Inggris, tetapi tentara menumpas kerusuhan tersebut, pemerintah menutupi pertumpahan darah, dan lebih dari 100 warga Malta dipenjara.

programme.title: The Librarian: The Quest For The Spear
programme.desc: A bookworm becomes the librarian. Same night a magical spear gets stolen and he's off to get some real life experience around the globe on his quest for the spear - starting with being thrown off a plane over Amazonas by his cute helper.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27
programme.desc: Danger swirls around the squad as they investigate a suspect for rape and try to protect their key witness. A new chief of detectives puts Benson to the test. An off-duty Fin tries to stop an assault in progress.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27
programme.desc: When a member of an elite social club is assaulted, Carisi must convince witnesses to come forward despite the club's strict confidentiality rules. Chief Tynan offers Benson some extra help. Velasco is confronted with a surprising opportunity.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27
programme.desc: Bruno suspects a bomb was planted to destroy DNA evidence in a rape case. Benson takes on a murder investigation connected to the bombing. Griffin experiences the frustrating setbacks of working an SVU case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27
programme.desc: When a tween suffers a life-threatening miscarriage, the SVU must unravel a web of online fabrications to identify a suspect. Rollins carefully weighs her career options.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27
programme.desc: When a woman in active labor is abducted, Rollins and Curry look to her doula for an account of events. Carisi tries to get a confession in front of the jury.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27
programme.desc: The squad investigates an assault at a house party where no one can identify the assailant. When two suspects are detained for questioning, Rollins takes the chance to turn one against the other.

programme.desc: The SVU must determine fact from fantasy when a famous author twists the details of a serious crime. Fin has a challenging day at work.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit S27
programme.desc: The hunt for a murder suspect uncovers a crime with shocking legal and ethical implications. Bruno must protect his squad during a raid on a suspect's home. Carisi and Price team up in court when Brady's interrogation tactics undermine the case.

programme.desc: A mysterious death in a hotel leads the squad into the world of professional fighting. Benson tries to convince a victim to come forward for the sake of his friend.

programme.desc: An unconscious and injured teen abandoned outside a hospital sends the SVU on a search for the people who left her there. Benson faces serious consequences when she chooses to protect a victim's secret under the pressure of cross examination.

programme.desc: An event threatens to cause a war so big that not even the transformers themselves can save the planet. And once again, as almost always, Sam Witwicky finds himself involuntarily in the middle of the conflict.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: The United States Government is using the technology rescued in the siege of Chicago to develop its own Transformers. Meanwhile, a mechanical inventor finds a Marmon semi-trailer and discovers that it is Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans and Transformers are at war. The key to ensuring the subsistence of humanity lies in the hidden history of the Transformers on Earth. Cade Yeager, along with his team, will do everything possible to save planet Earth.

programme.title: The fate of Jupiter
programme.desc: Jupiter Jones was born under the night sky, and signs pointed to her being destined for great things. Although he continues to dream of the stars, his life is reduced to the harsh reality of his job and endless problems.

programme.title: Aquaman and the lost kingdom
programme.desc: Black Manta seeks revenge on Aquaman for the death of his father. By wielding the power of the Black Trident, he becomes a formidable enemy. To defend Atlantis, Aquaman forges an alliance with his imprisoned brother.

programme.title: Titans of the Pacific: The Uprising
programme.desc: Jake Pentecost, son of Stacker Pentecost, reunites with Mako Mori to lead a new generation of Jaeger pilots, including rival Lambert and 15-year-old hacker, Amara, against a new Kaiju threat.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Ray Garrison, an elite soldier who died in battle, is brought back to life thanks to advanced technology that gives him the capabilities of super-human strength and rapid healing.

programme.title: Bitter Christmas - Inside Warner
programme.desc: Enjoy interviews with the cast and behind the scenes of the film "Bitter Christmas", written and directed by Pedro Almodóvar.

programme.desc: Sepasang kekasih dari Kashmir, Qais dan Laila, tak dapat bersatu karena ditentang oleh keluarga mereka. Namun takdir berkata lain, Laila menikah dengan pria lain sementara Qais pergi ke London.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are masterpieces of automotive art, cars of breathtaking elegance, extraordinary performance, built for speeds beyond imagination: Bugatti Chiron, Lykan Hypersports, Pagani Huayra and Ferrari LaFerrari. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg visits the Classic Expo in Salzburg, where he speaks with organizer Hermann Schwarz and several fellow classic car enthusiasts. In between, a short detour takes you to the famous auction of the Toffen Oldtimer Gallery in Switzerland before returning to Salzburg. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: LeJog, the toughest classic car rally in the world
programme.desc: 1,552 rally miles lie between the two ends of the British world, Land's End in Cornwall and John O'Groats in Scotland - they form the starting point and finish of the "Rally LeJog.

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: A special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. Today: The new Dodge Nitro is supposed to cause quite a stir in the SUV segment. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Since the 1950s, the Mercedes SL has been considered the sports car legend par excellence. Since the legendary 300SL Gullwing, the SL series has stood for innovation and cultivated sportiness. SL, that stands for 'Super Light'. The SL is still great. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Today's show is all about: premium performance. Because these two crackers deliver both in their own, unique way and with future-oriented drives. We were exclusively at the world premiere of the Mercedes CLA in Rome and revealed all the details about design, technology and features. Also: Six exciting facts about the ultimate station wagon, the BMW M5 Touring! (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Spotted
programme.desc: Harsh nature, unreal landscapes, unpredictable weather but also a paradise for four-wheel drive freaks. Iceland is Europe's off-road mecca. Matthias Göttenauer, globetrotter and experienced off-road expert, knows the island like no one else. He is on the volcano island to work on an off-road travel guide, the Island Trackbook. MOTORVISION accompanied him. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Together they have over 1,000 hp and almost 1,400 Nm of torque: the Porsche Cayenne Turbo and the Range Rover Supercharged. With these performance values, they are power off-roaders in the truest sense of the word. Hardly anyone on the street can fool these two. But what does it look like off-road? Motorvision is testing whether these power machines are also serious off-road vehicles. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Lucy is a guest in North Rhine-Westphalia and reveals who won the ultimate Bilstein B12 sports suspension and interviews the lucky guy. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes are testing for a new film. What is desired is a brilliant car accident that should later look as if an actor was actually sitting in the crash car. To master this challenge, stunt coordinator Christoph Domanski relies on his most experienced people. The report on the film and stunt production Action Concept from Hürth shows the tricks the team uses to implement this stunt. (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: One of Europe's leading manufacturers of luxury caravans and premium motorhomes has its headquarters in Jandelsbrunn, Lower Bavaria: the Knaus Tabbert company. It all started in the mid-50s. At that time, Alfred Tabbert built the “Ideal”, the first caravan in series production. The 'Margrave' follows in 1960. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The latest motor trends on two wheels? Motorvision TV shows them in “Motorcycles”. Bike fans get their money's worth here. The latest motorcycles, the best tips for cruisers and athletes and fantastic motorcycle routes – new every month! This time the Harley Sportster '72. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Sporty appearance in every situation. For many people, the extra portion of power is a must-have in everyday life. But which engine is best for which Daily? In-line four-cylinder in the Cupra Ateca Limited Edition? Six-cylinder boxer engine in the 718 GTS? Or V8 biturbo in the Audi RS6 Avant? (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Experiencing Mallorca with your own motorcycle is a special experience. The diversity of the Balearic island is simply incredible. This film shows the most beautiful and unique motorcycle roads in Mallorca. On our tours we often visit monasteries high up in the mountains, to which winding roads lead us. We visit highlights such as Sa Calobra and Cap Formentor at times of day when there are no tourists yet. Spectacular drone footage is of course also part of this fantastic documentation. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: The Opel Kadett C is the hit of the seventies. One of the proud owners is René Klauß. In his workshop in the Erzgebirge, he dismantled, sanded, painted and tuned the Rüsselsheimer Mini. Classic takes a closer look at its red flash in the city version. Also: The Orwell Supersports Cup visits Spa Francorchamps and thoroughbred racing driver Hans Hermann in a portrait. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Ferrari. The sports cars with the Prancing Horse in the coat of arms are the epitome of elegant and hot-blooded appearance. No other sports car contains as much magic and myth as the fiery red icons from Maranello. Whether on the road or on the racetrack, where the cars with the Prancing Horse on their crest start, they are the center of attention - Ferrari has that certain something that other brands have been looking for for 50 years. Whether LaFerrari, 488Spyder or the legend F40, Tetsa Rossa or 250 GTO, whether Formula 1 or the Ferrari World in Dubai, whether Sebastian Vettel or Niki Lauda, ​​Dream Cars shows the most exciting cars in red, takes a look (channel information).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Only Mercedes-Benz can boast this anniversary. The inventor of the automobile celebrates 120 years of motorsport history. In honor of the anniversary, a specially built, historic Mercedes 190 EVO will be racing at selected classic events. The 240 hp touring car is decorated with images of this motorsport era. Motorvision TV shares the cockpit with 5-time DTM champion Bernd Schneider at the three-hour premiere race at the Nürburgring. (Station info).

programme.title: Four-wheel drive adventure
programme.desc: Adventure Allrad, a special interest magazine about off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. The focus is on off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It is the icon of sports coupes and convertibles, no other car conveys the attitude to life of the 1960s as much as the Ford Mustang. With an unusual, striking shape and powerful engines, the Mustang won the hearts of its millions of fans right from the start. Car History shows the history of the Ford Mustang with many historical photos from the first prototype to the '64 classic to the latest Mustang Shelby with over 500 hp. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: But electric cars are not conquering the world everywhere. Europe is partly lagging behind the trend, which is why attractive vehicles are in demand. With the EV3, Kia is launching a new compact SUV at an affordable price. The EV6 also receives an update. We test both in Portugal. And: Europe's cheapest electric car is also getting an upgrade. We reveal five exciting facts about the Dacia Spring. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Practical, comfortable and highway-tested. These German everyday heroes bring home the shopping or are a hell of a lot of fun. At the Lausitzring we let the two most powerful VW Golfs compete against each other: GTI Clubsport versus R. Who does the job better? And the new VW Passat will be more comfortable and efficient. Will it get Volkswagen back on track? (Station info).

programme.title: Superbike: Australian Championship
programme.desc: The ASBK is an Australian motorcycle championship with up to seven events per season (channel info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg and his team partner Ralf Eisenbach take part in the Röntgen Classic, a one-day rally that starts in picturesque Lennep. Martin and Ralf drive through the Bergisches Land in the Mercedes 190 SLR together with another 159 teams. In this extra-long episode, Martin also visits Friedhelm Steinhaus' impressive vintage car museum, where a new surprise awaits behind every corner. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Whether it was the Monte Carlo Rally, the European Rally Championship or the Grand Road Prix of Argentina, Mercedes once dominated the rally scene with the sedate 180D or the heavy touring sedans 220 and 300SE. Because, what hardly anyone knows, after withdrawing from Formula 1 and Le Mans, Mercedes has been using rallying as a testing ground for a long time since the end of the 1950s because the use of near-production vehicles was required at that time. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.sub-title: Anticipation from the Retro Classics Essen 2026
programme.desc: In this Top Speed ​​episode, presenter Martin Utberg takes viewers to the press conference in advance of Retro Classics Essen, one of the largest classic car trade fairs in Europe. Organizers, the managing director of Messe Essen and prominent voices from the classic car scene have their say. We also look back at selected interviews that Martin conducted at Retro Classics in Stuttgart. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Their reputation is legendary, rally enthusiasts adore them: the monster rally cars of the so-called Group B. At the beginning of the 80s, a new classification entered rally sport. Suddenly turbocharged all-wheel-drive racing vehicles with up to 500 hp race across the international slopes. The drivers can barely control the vehicles, but with their sound and unbridled power they exert a huge fascination. Only the most serious accidents with dead drivers and fans put an end to the absolute irrationality. Today these cars enjoy cult status and are expensive collector's items. Also legendary: the BMW M E30 in the DTM version. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: In part 2 of the 120 years of Mercedes Motorsport, Car History tells the story of Mercedes in motorsport with many original recordings and original interviews, from the comeback after the accident in Le Mans, the beginnings of rallying in the sixties, the legendary appearance with the red pig in Spa, the countless DTM successes, the return to Le Mans with the prototypes to the Formula 1 World Championships with Mika Häkkinen and the triumph with your own team in Formula 1. (Station info).

programme.title: Australian Drag Racing Championship 2024
programme.desc: The "Australian Drag Racing Championship" is a regional motorsport series for top petrol dragsters that reach speeds of around 500 km/h in under 5 seconds (channel info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: After the drivers' precision was tested on three tracks, it's now all about speed at the Formula Offroad Iceland 2022 season opener in Hella. Who will get the first win of the new season? (Station info).

programme.title: US Pro Pulling 2023
programme.desc: Motorsport like you've never seen it before. In this competition, drivers use multi-engine, modified tractors to pull a heavy sled around the track. Some tractors can even produce more than 12,000 horsepower. This makes tractor pulling the strongest motorsport in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: US Pro Pulling 2023
programme.desc: Motorsport like you've never seen it before. In this competition, drivers use multi-engine, modified tractors to pull a heavy sled around the track. Some tractors can even produce more than 12,000 horsepower. This makes tractor pulling the strongest motorsport in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Australian Drag Racing Championship 2024
programme.desc: The "Australian Drag Racing Championship" is a regional motorsport series for top petrol dragsters that reach speeds of around 500 km/h in under 5 seconds (channel info).

Car History shows the history of the Ford Mustang with many historical photos from the first prototype to the '64 classic to the latest Mustang Shelby with over 500 hp. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: But electric cars are not conquering the world everywhere. Europe is partly lagging behind the trend, which is why attractive vehicles are in demand. With the EV3, Kia is launching a new compact SUV at an affordable price. The EV6 also receives an update. We test both in Portugal. And: Europe's cheapest electric car is also getting an upgrade. We reveal five exciting facts about the Dacia Spring. (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Gearing Up 2026
programme.desc: Pure passion for racing, extraordinary talent and thrills right up to the last second - that's what this magazine promises, reporting on the most exciting motorsport events. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: English luxury and German lifestyle. With an extended wheelbase, the Bentley Bentayga focuses on its rear passengers and pampers them with flawless workmanship and a champagne cooler. In the Mercedes CLE 53, however, the best place is behind the steering wheel. Mercedes wants to arouse emotions again with a 3-liter in-line six-cylinder engine. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: When it comes to affordable cars, Dacia is the first brand that comes to mind. The successful Duster model is in its third generation and is continuing to develop extremely. We are doing a low-budget road trip from Munich to Paris. Will a budget of €300 be enough for us? (Station info).

programme.title: Top speed – on the go
programme.desc: Jörg Bergmeister is a guest in this episode - Porsche test and development driver, Porsche brand ambassador and record holder for road-legal sports cars on the Nürburgring-Nordschleife, set in 2018 with a Porsche 911 GT2 RS MR. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM Aquabike World Championship 2025
programme.sub-title: GP of Italy, Ski Division, Olbia
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike Class Pro World Championship starts a new action-packed season. The registered pilots promise exciting races on the water again this year. (Station info).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: P1 Offshore Championship 2024
programme.sub-title: Lake of the Ozarks Shootout, Missouri
programme.desc: The P1 Offshore Championship is a US-based boat racing series. This is known for offering first-class boat races, where drivers reach speeds of up to 250 km/h (channel info).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Fédération Internationale de Motocyclisme has organized the X-Trial World Championship annually since 1993. In contrast to the outdoor discipline, the X-Trail competitions take place indoors. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: Another total cancellation of the race day on the Isle of Man due to the weather, but instead we had the opportunity to talk in more detail with the Crowe brothers and Davey Todd and take a look back at the most spectacular races of the week. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2025
FIM Enduro World Championship 2025
programme.desc: The show follows the world's best enduro pilots as they compete around the globe. (Station info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: After the drivers' precision was tested on three tracks, it's now all about speed at the Formula Offroad Iceland 2022 season opener in Hella. Who will get the first win of the new season? (Station info).

programme.title: All Wheel Drive Safari Challenge 2025
programme.desc: The "AWDC" is a British off-road event in which drivers have to tackle narrow and winding roads full of mud and gravel (channel info).

programme.title: US Pro Pulling 2023
programme.desc: Motorsport like you've never seen it before. In this competition, drivers use multi-engine, modified tractors to pull a heavy sled around the track. Some tractors can even produce more than 12,000 horsepower. This makes tractor pulling the strongest motorsport in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Monster Jam Championship 2024
programme.desc: Since 1992, a competition series has been held every year, culminating in the Monster Jam World Finals in Las Vegas. There are racing and freestyle competitions for monster trucks. (Station info).

programme.title: Australian Drag Racing Championship 2024
programme.desc: The "Australian Drag Racing Championship" is a regional motorsport series for top petrol dragsters that reach speeds of around 500 km/h in under 5 seconds (channel info).

programme.title: Belgian Rally Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Belgian Rally Championship is one of the most competitive rally championships at national level. This also attracts prominent guest starters such as Thierry Neuville, Craig Breen and Stéphane Lefebvre. (Station info).

programme.title: IMSA WeatherTech SportsCar Championship 2026
programme.sub-title: LIVE Detroit Grand Prix, Detroit Street Circuit
programme.desc: The IMSA WeatherTech SportsCar Championship is an endurance championship in North America in which up to five different classes compete against each other in eleven events (channel info).

programme.desc: We are looking for the king of off-road pickups! The off-road specialists from Delta 4x4 convert the VW Amarok into a beast. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In 2019, Porsche celebrated 70 years of sports car history. For this occasion, it was decided to recreate a completely new vehicle of the type 993 based on an existing original bodyshell - the unique "Project Gold". Also: the Q5 Sportback, Audi's mid-range SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Danger in your neck and still in a good mood? No problem for the full professionals at Action Concept. Spectacular stunts are her job – and her passion! Explosions, flights, jumps, breathtaking images and exciting behind-the-scene stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: Bizarre mishaps, weird crashes and unbelievable nonsense on four wheels, fabricated in everyday life and immortalized on camera. Great workout for your laughing muscles! (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Maybach – the finest car manufacturer from Germany. Each model is made entirely by hand. An outstanding vehicle, the absolute pinnacle of driving comfort, timeless aesthetics and workmanship. A Maybach is considered the measure of all things modern automotive technology. These vehicles were forgotten for over 60 years - until Mercedes-Benz revived the luxury brand in 2002. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good condition, others a little polished, the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.desc: The IMSA WeatherTech SportsCar Championship is an endurance championship in North America in which up to five different classes compete against each other in eleven events (channel info).

programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart to Hades
programme.desc: In a rare moment of compassion, Lone Wolf rescues a girl who has killed a pimp in self-defense. By his code, he is forced to endure being tortured to within an inch of his life. Lone Wolf takes to the road again, where his expertise is very much in demand, so much so that a would-be employer had already had a contract placed on him. The slayer with the baby cart proceeds down bloodstained paths to Hades.

programme.title: Nine Deaths of the Ninja
programme.desc: A group of drug runners/freedom fighters has kidnapped a busload of tourists in the Philippines and is threatening to kill them all if one of their partners is not released from prison and the government doesn't halt its anti-drug policies. To stop the criminals, a trio of specialist soldiers are called in. Even with all their training, will they be able to stop the terrorists when they begin killing hostages and turning loose their squads of attack midgets?

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Wildfires hit the Valley, poisoning everything: marriages, neuro-psych evals, cheeseburgers, fifth homes; when someone poops in a hat, one A.I. friend to teens might just be the hero we've been waiting for; there's bad news about Linus Po.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S16 E212 - The sporty side of the VW GroupThe perfectionist Audi R8 and the spirited Lamborghini Huracán are presented. The R8 Quattro Performance and the Huracán EVO get a particle filter. And: The Macan S comes with a new V6 engine.

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: S14 - Biker's Paradise Sierra Nevada, Andalusia 2024, Part 1The magazine for motorcycle fans reports on biker clubs, tours, meetings and events.

programme.title: Classic Folge 108
programme.desc: Episode 108The BMW 02 Series is based on the technology of the successful four-door BMW 1500 to 2000 and was immediately the favorite of car testers and buyers. Even today it still looks timelessly elegant. In the track test, a BMW 2002 ti has to show what it can do.

programme.title: Crash Folge 28
programme.desc: S2 E28 — Episode 28We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the curve. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: S2 E27 - Legendary sports carsFerrari 250 GTO, Porsche 911, Aston Martin DB 5 or Lamborghini Aventador and Ferrari LaFerrari - every era produces car dreams, born from the fascination for breathtaking design and the dream for fascinating speed.

programme.title: Top Speed Classic Ode an Jochen Mass
programme.desc: S6 E222 — Ode to Jochen MassMartin Utberg and Ralf Eisenbach say goodbye to a racing legend. In Jochen Mass' local bar "Agnesenhof" at the Nürburgring, they review the career of the late former Formula 1 driver.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: American Way of DriveAmong other things, the Ford Fairlane from 1967 is presented.

programme.title: Adventure four-wheel drive episode 46
programme.desc: S4 E46 — Episode 46This magazine deals with various off-road and all-wheel drive vehicles. It provides information about off-road veterans and cars with four-wheel drive. The vehicles are presented and their qualities are examined in more detail.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S1 E3 — Chevrolet CorvetteThis episode shows the history of Louis Chevrolet and the brand he founded as well as the successful models Bel Air and Impala. The focus is also on the manufacturer's current models: Chevrolet Corvette and Chevrolet Camaro.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: E70 — Sweden road trip with the VW ID.7 TourLong routes and electric cars have not been friends so far, but that is about to change. For example with this vehicle: The VW ID.7 offers a range of around 700 kilometers in the Pro-S version and plenty of space as a tourer.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S1 E104 — Audi Q3 world premiereAudi's economic situation is tense. Costs have to go down and profits have to go up. As one of the best-selling models, the success of the new Q3 has a major impact on the future of the Bavarian brand. We attended the world premiere, took a seat in the new compact SUV and spoke to experts.

programme.desc: S1 — 2024 Superbike, Morgan Park, QueenslandThe show reports on the Australian Superbike Championship.

programme.title: Gearing Up 2026
programme.desc: The show provides insights into what happens at the world's most unique motorsport events.

programme.title: FastZone 2026 Episode 4

programme.title: Super Cars Luxury and Lifestyle
programme.desc: S16 E231 — Luxury and LifestyleEnglish luxury and German lifestyle. With an extended wheelbase, the Bentley Bentayga focuses on its rear passengers and pampers them with flawless workmanship and a champagne cooler.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S1 E103 — Low Budget Road Trip to ParisWhen it comes to affordable cars, Dacia is the first brand that comes to mind for many. The successful Duster model is in its third generation and is continuing to develop extremely. We're doing a low-budget road trip from Munich to Paris.

programme.title: Top speed - on the go
programme.desc: This episode features Jörg Bergmeister as a guest - Porsche test and development driver, Porsche brand ambassador and record holder for road-legal sports cars on the Nürburgring-Nordschleife, set in 2018 with a Porsche 911 GT2 RS MR.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: E73 — Transport of the futureHow will we transport goods and people in the future? The pack mules on our roads are also evolving and moving with the times.

programme.title: 4x4 - The all-wheel magazine Allrad-Fun: On- and off-road
programme.desc: S3 E87 — All-wheel drive fun: on- and off-road All-wheel drive is only fun off-road? Absolutely not! And these two are proof: We check the new Subaru Forester on and off-road. And: This all-wheel drive stunner is probably one of the most extraordinary electric cars. Five facts about the Hyundai Ioniq 5 N.

programme.desc: E7 — 2024 Top Fuel Final, WillowbankThe Australian Drag Racing Championship is a regional motorsport series for top petrol dragsters that reach speeds of around 500 km/h in under 5 seconds.

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks.

programme.title: 4x4 - The all-wheel drive magazine pick ups
programme.desc: S1 E36 — Pick UpsThe combination of car and commercial vehicle is practical and versatile. That's why the success of pick-ups continues unabated. In this episode, the Japanese cargo donkey Mitsubishi L200 is tested off-road and on the road.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E25 — Episode 25There is a driving report of the Audi Q4 Sportback e-tron and the mild hybrid Subaru XV is being tested.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower! Akrapovic sports exhaust
programme.desc: S4 E5 — Sport Exhaust AkrapovicLucy is a guest at Akrapovič in Slovenia, the leading manufacturer of exhaust systems for motorcycles and premium automobiles. In addition, a new racing model of the Mini is presented that shatters common clichés.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: S2 E7 — Jump'n CrashA car is supposed to crash over a ramp into a pile of parked junk vehicles. Loads of gasoline will explode around stunt driver Christoph Knobi Knobloch after the impact. A risky stunt, because if the stunt vehicle gets caught in the pile, falls accidentally or the charges burn out, it could be very dangerous for Knobi.

programme.title: Dumbest Stuff on Wheels
programme.desc: S1 E13 — Episode 13Humans and machines sometimes don't make a good mix. Especially when it comes to operating very heavy or fast vehicles. The program shows video recordings that provide evidence.

programme.title: Made in....

programme.title: Mission Mobility Folge 28
programme.desc: S3 E28 — Episode 28Karim Al Azhari's passion is fast cars. He is a racing driver and president of the Porsche Club in the United Arab Emirates. Karim loves and lives luxury, but every now and then he is really stressed.

programme.title: Motorcycles
